text.title: SDLC + AI Domain Overview Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: User asks 'help me ship faster'; router returns 40 candidates.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects routes without concrete signal.

antipattern.symptom: Cluster has 0 active methodologies but appears in router output.
Team coins 'pipeline' cluster; cross-team retrieval breaks.
